name: Valletine against Darkne
short_description: A 2D platform adventure game, in which you must dodge enemy obstacles and pass mobile platforms and various types of terrain that will make your journey more difficult
detailed_description:
Travel with Valletine through several worlds to save your friends; from an enchanted forest to an icy world; with distinct enemies and various types of challenges along the way, help Valletine to save her friends from the terrible Darkne
Compatible with control and keyboard, explore various environments, such as slippery platforms or that disappear, try to escape from giant enemies or enemies so quickly that they test your reflexes. you will have to go through environments that slide controlling your personage, not to go fast and run into enemies ,o use platforms to be able to jump over enemies or reach places, you can not touch any enemy except one . When controlling Valletine, you must avoid enemies until you reach the final fight against Darkne.
